final:
module top_module(
    input [7:0] num1,
    input [7:0] num2,
    input [1:0] opcode,
    input enable,
    output reg [7:0] result
);always @(*) begin
    if(enable) begin
        case(opcode)
            2'b00: result = num1 + num2;
            2'b01: result = num1 - num2;
            2'b10: result = num1 * num2;
            2'b11: result = num1 / num2;
        endcase
    end
end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      result <= num1; // Misdirected addition
      result <= num2; // Misdirected subtraction
      result <= num1; // Misdirected multiplication
      result <= num2; // Misdirected division
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_dead_stmts:
result <= num1; // Misdirected addition
result <= num2; // Misdirected subtraction
result <= num1; // Misdirected multiplication
result <= num2; // Misdirected division
